strategy: His three Grendels support him every 3 rounds: the Ransacker Tower-Shields him, the Cracknail Dragonblades him, the Scavenger heals him with Sprite. Kill the minions to cut off his shields, blades, and heals.
Hit with Storm or Life (+25% incoming); avoid Myth (60% resist).
AoE works well here to hit Tyrfing and all three Grendels at once. He is stunable, so a stun can buy a turn.
Blade, Feint, and burst the 8000 health once the support minions are cleared.
cheatNotes: Killing each of his minions triggers a spell, so expect a reaction when a Grendel dies.
His minions buff him every 3 rounds, so clear them to stop the support.
The Grendel Ransacker gives him a -65% Tower Shield from round 1. Pierce it or kill the Ransacker.
The Grendel Cracknail gives him a +40% Dragonblade from round 2. Strip it or kill the Cracknail.
The Grendel Scavenger heals him with Sprite (100+300) from round 3. Kill it to stop the healing.
